name: Mozzarella Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a single layer of tomatoes in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine bread cubes, 2 cups of cheese, bacon, butter, celery, onion, eggs, garlic salt, and oregano; mix well.
3. Spoon the mixture over the tomatoes.
4. Top with remaining tomatoes; sprinkle with remaining cheese.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
